cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose grave/decoration quality-change diagnostics to the BepInEx console. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.modify_graves.name: Modify Graves
cfg.modify_graves.desc: Max out the base quality of every grave-category item so your graveyard score is capped from the start.
cfg.modify_decorations.name: Modify Decorations
cfg.modify_decorations.desc: Max out the base quality of grave-quality decoration objects too - not just the gravestones/fences themselves.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
